Headline: #95 95th Temporary Reroute at 93rd/Woodlawn
ShortDescription: 95 95th  buses are temporarily rerouted via 93rd, Stony Island, 95th and Cottage Grove: due to, street blockage near 93rd/Woodlawn.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:

Headline: #87 87th Temporary Reroute near 87th/Indiana
ShortDescription: 87 87th buses temp. rerouted due to, fire department activity near 87th/Indiana.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 87th/Indiana, due to fire department activity near 87th/Indiana.

Eastbound buses will operate via 87th, State, 83rd, King Drive and 87th including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses will operate via 87th, King Drive, 83rd, Lafayette and 87th.

Allow extra travel time.
